bundles.title: Async Store Interfaces & ArtifactStoreError
bundles.goal: Migrate RunArtifactStore and ChangeArtifactStore interfaces to Promise-based signatures and introduce ArtifactStoreError typed error hierarchy.

tasks.title: Define ArtifactStoreErrorKind type and ArtifactStoreError class with kind discriminant in artifact-types.ts
Change RunArtifactStore interface methods (read, write, exists, list) to return Promise<T>
Change ChangeArtifactStore interface methods (read, write, exists, list, listChanges, changeExists) to return Promise<T>
Remove ArtifactNotFoundError class; retain UnknownArtifactTypeError unchanged
Update all import sites that referenced ArtifactNotFoundError to use ArtifactStoreError

bundles.title: LocalFs Adapter Async Wrapping
bundles.goal: Wrap LocalFsRunArtifactStore and LocalFsChangeArtifactStore sync FS calls in Promise.resolve/reject to conform to the new async interface.

tasks.title: Update LocalFsRunArtifactStore methods to return Promise.resolve for success and Promise.reject(ArtifactStoreError) for failure
Update LocalFsChangeArtifactStore methods to return Promise.resolve for success and Promise.reject(ArtifactStoreError) for failure
Replace all throw ArtifactNotFoundError with Promise.reject(new ArtifactStoreError({kind: 'not_found'}))
Map FS errors (ENOENT, EACCES, etc.) to appropriate ArtifactStoreError kinds

bundles.title: Run-Store-Ops Async Migration
bundles.goal: Migrate run-store-ops.ts helper functions to async, keeping extractSequence as sync pure computation.

tasks.title: Add async to readRunState, findRunsForChange, findLatestRun, generateRunId
Add await to all store method calls within run-store-ops functions
Verify extractSequence remains sync (pure computation, no store calls)

bundles.title: Core Runtime & Helpers Async Migration
bundles.goal: Migrate all 7 core command functions and _helpers.ts to async, preserving the Result<Ok, CoreRuntimeError> envelope.

tasks.title: Migrate loadRunState and writeRunState in _helpers.ts to async; catch ArtifactStoreError and convert to CoreRuntimeError Result
Migrate start.ts to async function returning Promise<Result<RunState, CoreRuntimeError>>
Migrate advance.ts to async
Migrate suspend.ts to async
Migrate resume.ts to async
Migrate status.ts to async
Migrate update-field.ts and get-field.ts to async
Migrate artifact-phase-gates.ts to await exists() calls
Migrate InteractionRecordStore methods that call ChangeArtifactStore to async (propagated dependency)
Migrate review-runtime.ts store read/write calls to async

bundles.title: CLI Entry Points Async Migration
bundles.goal: Wrap CLI main() functions in async and await all core runtime calls, preserving stdout/stderr/exit code behavior.

tasks.title: Convert specflow-run.ts main to async; add await to all core runtime calls
Convert specflow-prepare-change.ts main to async; add await to all core runtime calls
Map unhandled ArtifactStoreError rejections to stderr output and exit code 1
Verify observable CLI behavior (stdout, stderr, exit codes) is unchanged via manual smoke test

bundles.title: Test Suite Async Migration
bundles.goal: Migrate all test files, InMemoryRunArtifactStore, and in-memory change store helpers to async/await with no behavioral assertion changes.

tasks.title: Update InMemoryRunArtifactStore to return Promises and reject with ArtifactStoreError
Update in-memory change store helper to return Promises and reject with ArtifactStoreError
Add async/await to all test functions that call store methods or core runtime functions
Update error assertion tests to check ArtifactStoreError.kind instead of instanceof ArtifactNotFoundError
Run full test suite and verify all tests pass with no behavioral changes

bundles.title: Conformance Test Suite for External Adapters
bundles.goal: Create exportable conformance test factory functions that validate any RunArtifactStore or ChangeArtifactStore implementation against the contract.

tasks.title: Create runArtifactStoreConformance factory function covering read/write/exists/list contract
Create changeArtifactStoreConformance factory function covering all 6 method contracts
Add error-path tests: not_found rejection, write_failed, read_failed kinds
Create conformance/index.ts barrel export
Configure npm package exports for specflow-node/conformance entry point
Validate conformance suite passes with InMemoryRunArtifactStore

bundles.title: Architecture Documentation & Persistence Contract
bundles.goal: Update docs/architecture.md with persistence contract status change and CoreRunState → DB column mapping guidance.

tasks.title: Update persistence contract status from 'deferred-required' to 'defined' in architecture.md
Add CoreRunState → SQL type mapping table with recommended column types and notes
Add BREAKING notice section documenting the sync-to-async interface migration for external consumers
